name: pi-agent-codebase-workflows
description_en: Pi skills and prompt templates for structured YAML artifact workflows: safe-start, codebase-recon, safe-change, architecture review, structured-doc validation, and legacy docs migration.
description_zh: Pi 技能和提示模板，用于结构化 YAML 工件工作流：安全启动、代码库侦察、安全更改、架构审查、结构化文档验证和遗留文档迁移
